DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-22-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOWERS, GREGORY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: EUROPA HOTEL 310 COLUMBUS AVE #108 $1,485.95 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,485.95, STAYED UNTIL MAR-02-1993, LEASE FORFEITED

JURY ROOM-NILS ROSENQUEST, JUDGE PRO TEMP C/C FOR SETTLEMNT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED WITH ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. STIP JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. FOR RESTITUTION OF OF EUROPA HOTEL RM #108 310 COLLUMBUS AVE AND FOR MONEY JUDGMENT OF PAST DUE RENTS & DAILY DAMAGES OF $1485.95 WRIT FORTHWITH STAY ACTUAL PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 3/2/93 AT 12PM. IF DEFT VACATES BY 12PM PLTF ON 3/2/93 SHALL FORGIVE THE MONEY POSTION OF THE JUDGMENT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COST & ATTYS FEES. NO ONE ELSE CLAIMS A RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND THERE IS A MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIM THAT MAY HAVE ARISEN BETWEEN PLTF. AND DEFT AS A RESULT OF THE LANDLORD TENANT RELATIONSIP
